title: UIseott
description: A UI pack featuring green and purple, named after meeeeeee
body:
An UI pack named after meeeeeee*

This UI pack features green and purple, my two favorite colors. the buttons also use the look of the built-in high contrast, but modified to fit the pack!

*Not only my username, but also my Sonic profile picture, where Sonic was posed in a new pose.

[SlipSlug](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/slipslug/) helped me test textures for Realms, by inviting me to their realm. (also there were textures for realms that i didnt even know existed)

[This pack was originally posted to PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/reddy-s-gui/), now that i have updated it, i decided to bring it to Modrinth.
